name: Eve Holding, Inc.
summary: Eve Holding, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated aerospace company headquartered in Melbourne, Florida and São Paulo, Brazil, developing Urban Air Mobility (UAM) solutions. Its products include an electric vertical take-off and landing vehicle (eVTOL), TechCare maintenance and support services for eVTOLs, and Vector, an Urban Air Traffic Management system. Eve has approximately 2,700 non-binding vehicle orders valued at ~$14 billion from 28 launch customers and benefits from a strategic relationship with Embraer S.A.

products.name: eVTOL
products.description: Electric vertical take-off and landing vehicle using a lift plus cruise configuration designed for urban air mobility operations.

products.name: TechCare
products.description: Portfolio of maintenance and support services focused on Eve and third-party eVTOL aircraft.

products.name: Vector
products.description: Urban Air Traffic Management (UATM) system designed to allow eVTOLs to operate safely in dense urban airspace alongside conventional aircraft and drones.

partnerships.description: Strategic relationship providing aviation heritage, technology, and services support to Eve's UAM development and operations.
